title: malus × zumi
intro: Malus × zumi, also known as the Jujube or Chinese Date, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to Asia, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The Malus × zumi plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, known for its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus × zumi include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Malus × zumi can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or dried fruits, and is also used in various forms of traditional Chinese medicine, such as infusions and decoctions.
